# Trifluridine 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Trifluridine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Trifluridine</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Trifluridine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Colorectal cancer Lonsurf is indicated in combination with bevacizumab for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC) who have received two prior anticancer treatment...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>colonic neoplasm（98.9%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（98.6%）</li>
<li>colonic lymphangioma（98.6%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（98.6%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（98.6%）</li>
<li>colon leiomyoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of cecum（98.5%）</li>
<li>cavernous hemangioma of colon（98.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/trifluridine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>

  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
  margin-left: 4px;
}
</style>
